creator: ports@skyforge.at
text:
(In reply to Christopher May-Townsend from comment #0)
Hi,

I was planning in skipping this update since our ports have moved from 1.2.1 a long time ago, so no FreeBSD user should be affected by this. Additionally, 1.11.0-rc1 was released today, so we might as well just wait for that release to drop, which given synapse's developement speed is probably later this week. Does that sound good for you?
